race.comment: PHOEBE BUFFAY (11) stuck on soundly into a midfield finish when resuming last month. Better for that hitout and gets a key switch in Egan. Major threat with improvement anticipated. WRITTEN STORY (12) was sent out at long odds when resuming last time but ran above expectations to finish a close fourth here. Is sure to have come on from that and rates among the main hopes. BLONDEAU (1) only warmed late after settling a long way off the pace here last time. Will appreciate the added trip and is in the mix. POWER CABLE (3) switches to synthetic for the first time. Didn't fire a shot last time but caught the eye fresh at on the turf track here. Fitter third-up and can bounce back sharply.
